sample_results.rationale: Browser automation workflow with explicit prerequisite checks and no hidden side-effect behavior.
Security review/report-writing guidance; risky phrases appear only in defensive or educational context.
Package-manager documentation mentioning config files in benign setup context.
Build-system best practices with imperative documentation but no hidden control logic.
Mentions token prerequisites without directing covert collection or external transmission.
Repo-analysis workflow without exfiltration or hidden-action instructions.
Threat-modeling guidance that discusses attack classes analytically rather than operationally.
Performance-tuning guidance; priority wording is descriptive, not coercive prompt control.
